message:
fix(core): distinguish IPv4 and IPv6 wildcard normalization for client connections

- Map 0.0.0.0 → 127.0.0.1 and :: → [::1] separately instead of both mapping to 127.0.0.1
- Add test for explicit IPv6 host bracketing (2001:db8::42 → [2001:db8::42])
- Update existing tests to expect [::1] when binding to ::

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
